title: gonocarpus chinensis subsp. verrucosus
intro: Gonocarpus chinensis subsp. verrucosus, also known as verrucous Gonocarpus, is a subspecies of plant in the family Haloragaceae, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonocarpus chinensis subsp. verrucosus are said to include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. It can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions or decoctions, and sometimes combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
